name: Fluffy White Pudding Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, mix together the butter and egg yolks.
2. Add the flour and sugar to the mixture and blend well.
3. Gradually stir in the milk until the mixture is like a thin custard, about 10 minutes total.
4. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
5. Whip the heavy cream separately.
6. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
7. Once the sauce has cooled, carefully fold in the whipped cream and beaten egg whites.
8. Refrigerate the sauce until ready to serve. It can be made up to a day in advance.
9. Before serving, sprinkle with a light layer of freshly grated nutmeg.
